description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this black dufflebag from yelloe comes with a striped upper and a spacious inner to hold your daily essentials.Height: 30 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 16 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleTwo side pocketsLegs at baseBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
